'''katogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psc|psc]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psc|psc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| katogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kætegeth|kætegeth]] || [[word:kætegej|kætegej]] || [[word:kætegesh|kætegesh]] || [[word:kætege|kætege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:katotogoth|katotogoth]] || [[word:katotogoj|katotogoj]] || [[word:katotogosh|katotogosh]] || [[word:katotogo|katotogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:katogoth|katogoth]] || [[word:katogoj|katogoj]] || [[word:katogosh|katogosh]] || [[word:katogo|katogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:katofgoth|katofgoth]] || [[word:katofgoj|katofgoj]] || [[word:katofgosh|katofgosh]] || [[word:katofgof|katofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:katogotho|katogotho]] || [[word:katogojo|katogojo]] || [[word:katogosho|katogosho]] || [[word:katogoko|katogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:katogoth|katogoth]] || [[word:katogoj|katogoj]] || [[word:katogosh|katogosh]] || [[word:katogo|katogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:katogothol|katogothol]] || [[word:katogojol|katogojol]] || [[word:katogoshol|katogoshol]] || [[word:katogokol|katogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:katogothotho|katogothotho]] || [[word:katogojojo|katogojojo]] || [[word:katogoshosho|katogoshosho]] || [[word:katogoko|katogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:katogothon|katogothon]] || [[word:katogojon|katogojon]] || [[word:katogoshon|katogoshon]] || [[word:katogokon|katogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:katogothoro|katogothoro]] || [[word:katogojoro|katogojoro]] || [[word:katogoshoro|katogoshoro]] || [[word:katogokoro|katogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
